outcome_contract.why: Two booking pages display wrong WhatsApp CTA labels. Bug B is visually broken today. Bug A is fragile and would silently break if section translations diverge.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Both WhatsApp CTA buttons on the apartment booking and double-room booking pages use semantically correct translation keys, eliminating label drift risk.

engineering_coverage.applicable: Bug B still renders "More About This Room"

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: 18 locale files gain one root-level key

stage_payload.decision_summary: Two private-rooms booking pages use wrong i18n translation keys for their WhatsApp CTA buttons. This analysis selects the fix approach for each bug. Bug A (ApartmentBookContent) is a 1-line key path correction with no locale changes. Bug B (DoubleRoomBookContent) requires choosing how to expose a correct `whatsappCta` key to the component.
goals: Select the cleanest fix for Bug A (wrong key path within correct namespace)
Select the cleanest fix for Bug B (wrong key in wrong namespace)
Avoid locale key proliferation or unnecessary namespace loading
non_goals: Fixing pre-existing machine translation quality issues in vi/zh
constraints: Must not change rendered text in any locale
Locale files must be updated consistently across all 18 locales
assumptions: `apartmentPage.book.whatsappCta` is the canonical source of translated WhatsApp CTA text
Loading an entire namespace for one key is not ideal

evaluation_criteria.Why it matters: Locale edits are error-prone and need 18-file consistency
Fewer locale files to touch = fewer mistakes
Key name should reflect the feature, not a sibling page
Loading a large namespace for one key wastes bundle budget
Fix should remain correct if CTA copy diverges between room types

options_considered.Upside: Semantically correct; no locale changes needed; key exists in all 18 locales

options_considered.Downside: Still semantically wrong; same fragility problem
options_considered.Viable?: No — same problem as current code

options_considered.Downside: Requires 18 locale edits for no functional benefit
options_considered.Viable?: No — unnecessary complexity when A1 exists

options_considered.Description: Add `whatsappCta` to root of `bookPage.json` in all 18 locales; use `tBook("whatsappCta")`
options_considered.Upside: `tBook` already loaded; semantically correct (booking fallback is booking-generic); clean root-level placement

options_considered.Downside: Loads entire 6kb+ `apartmentPage` namespace for one key; couples double-room semantics to apartment namespace

options_considered.Upside: Grouped with existing apartment keys in bookPage
options_considered.Downside: Semantically wrong for double-room (not apartment-specific); would require `tBook("apartment.whatsappCta")`
options_considered.Key risks: Copy would be semantically tied to apartment

options_considered.Downside: `roomsPage` is a room-listing namespace, not booking; semantically wrong home

process_topology.note: None: no material process topology change. Both changes are isolated i18n key lookups in client components. No workflow, lifecycle state, CI lane, approval path, or operator runbook is affected.
